name: dbappsecurity-mingyu-waf
description: OctoBus package for DBAPPSecurity Mingyu WAF IP blocking rules (basic rules) and IP allowlist rules (protection control rules).

mingyu_waf.v1.WafService/DeleteBlockRule.name: delete-block-rule
mingyu_waf.v1.WafService/DeleteBlockRule.description: Delete an IP blocking rule by ID.

mingyu_waf.v1.WafService/ListAllowRules.name: list-allow-rules
mingyu_waf.v1.WafService/ListAllowRules.description: List IP allowlist rules (protection control rules).

mingyu_waf.v1.WafService/DeleteAllowRule.name: delete-allow-rule
mingyu_waf.v1.WafService/DeleteAllowRule.description: Delete an IP allowlist rule by ID.
